column4: Description / What to Measure (Score 1-5)
How easy is it to install, configure, and document the tool?
How quickly can a Flutter developer become productive with this tool?
How often does the AI generate syntactically and semantically correct Dart/Flutter code?
Ability to generate a small, functional feature completely from scratch based on a prompt.
Is the generated code clean, modular, and adhering to standard Flutter styling conventions?
Does the AI maintain consistent naming conventions, state management, and architectural patterns?
How strictly and accurately does the AI follow the specific rules and constraints provided?
Ability to remember project structure, previous code, or prompt context across a session.
How well does it handle large codebases without "forgetting" early information or failing?
Does it achieve the desired output concisely without wasting token limits on unnecessary text?
Can the tool consistently apply project-level constraints without re-prompting in every interaction and strictly follow defined architecture rules?
How well does the AI help outline and plan a feature before writing the implementation code?
Ability to evaluate Post Fusion system and output a clear architectural summary/markdown.
How well does it handle persona prompting (e.g., acting sequentially as Architect, Implementer, Reviewer)?
Can the tool utilize sub-agents to break down and execute complex, multi-file tasks asynchronously?
How efficiently can it identify and resolve small to medium bugs in existing code?
How effectively can the developer converse with the AI to refine and tweak a generated feature?
When the AI makes an error, how well does it recover, understand the correction, and fix it?
Ability to analyze code, identify technical debt, and generate a list of refactoring recommendations.
Can the model be run locally or in a secure sandbox to keep proprietary code completely private?
How cost-effective is the model for a development team (API costs, token costs, subscription)?
Speed of code generation and suggestions (critical for not interrupting developer workflow/flow state).
How seamless is the integration with VS Code, Android Studio, or IntelliJ?
How often do you experience Rate Limiting?
Ability to generate meaningful, accurate doc comments, inline comments, or README files.
Subjective team observation: Does this tool actually save time and reduce cognitive load?
